ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agricultural_data" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded data */,
  "total_area_affected" INTEGER /* Total area affected by environmental events */,
  "total_area_damaged" INTEGER /* Total area damaged by environmental events */,
  "flood_area_affected" INTEGER /* Area affected by floods */,
  "flood_area_damaged" INTEGER /* Area damaged by floods */,
  "drought_area_affected" INTEGER /* Area affected by droughts */,
  "drought_area_damaged" INTEGER /* Area damaged by droughts */,
  "food_production" INTEGER /* Total food production for the year */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the regions table */,
  "weather_event_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the weather events table */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the agricultural data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_data_weather_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_event_id") REFERENCES weather_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of weather event (e.g., flood, drought) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the event occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the regions table */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the weather event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the weather event */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the weather event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_events_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of production */,
  "crop_type" TEXT /* Type of crop produced */,
  "yield" INTEGER /* Yield of the crop */,
  "area_harvested" INTEGER /* Area harvested for the crop */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the regions table */,
  "weather_event_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the weather events table */,
  "yield_per_acre" REAL /* Yield per acre of the crop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_food_production_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_food_production_weather_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_event_id") REFERENCES weather_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_types" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop type */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crop */,
  "crop_category" TEXT /* Category of the crop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location details of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the prediction */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop predicted */,
  "predicted_yield" INTEGER /* Predicted yield for the crop */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Predictive model used to generate the prediction */,
  "input_data" TEXT /* Input data used to generate the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crop_types ("crop_id")
)
